transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the astronomy club's stargazing event tonight?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. The weather is supposed to be clear, so it should be perfect for observing the stars.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man going to the event?

questions.prompt: Why is the man going to the event?

choices.text: Because the weather should be good for observing the stars.
To study for an astronomy exam.

questions.explanation: He says clear weather will make stargazing ideal.
questions.evidence: The weather is supposed to be clear, so it should be perfect for observing the stars.
